title: Augmenting Auditor Judgment in High-Stakes Financial Compliance
conference: Designed and deployed a hybrid AI system (classification model + LLM-based pipeline) that flags potential compliance violations. Collaborated with legal auditors.

title: Supporting Professional Reflection through Critical AI Feedback
conference: Led the end-to-end design and implementation of a Google Slides add-on. Conducted a technology probe study (N=13) with product managers.

title: Aligning AI Agent Outputs with User Intent via Metacognitive Self-Adaptation
conference: Led the end-to-end design, implementation, and evaluation of a metacognitive architecture integrating symbolic knowledge and LLMs. Deployed the architecture with 500+ students. Validated the architecture using a controlled synthetic dataset.

title: VAL: Interactive Task Planning Interface
conference: Engineered an interactive React interface for a neural-symbolic planning agent. Enabled transparent human-in-the-loop oversight via real-time WebSocket communication.

title: Sound Clouds: Participatory Music Generation
conference: Fine-tuned YOLO12n (98.3% accuracy). Conducted data collection, analysis, and visualization (N=35) on user interaction patterns.

title: Calibrating User Trust and Mitigating Overreliance Under LLM Inconsistency
conference: Designed a controlled online experiment (N=252). Led statistical analysis (regression modeling, hypothesis testing in Python/R). Engineered a backend experimental infrastructure (Flask, SQLite).

title: Explainable Churn Prediction to Support Operational Decision-Making
conference: Developed a customer churn prediction model (XGBoost) with SHAP explanations. Built a SQL-based customer lifecycle tracking pipeline.

title: Real-Time Background Segmentation
conference: Architected and developed a real-time background segmentation model (PyTorch) using a lightweight backbone and dense connections. Enabled robust training on unlabeled datasets by engineering a knowledge-distillation pipeline with a consistency loss. Deployed the optimized model via ONNX.

title: LTE Network KPI Analysis
conference: Analyzed and visualized KPI correlations on LTE eNB datasets using PCA to assess input-output predictability.

title: FORECST: Online Hackathon Platform
conference: Led full-stack development (React.js, Firebase) of an online platform hosting virtual hackathons.

title: MYFIT: Clothing Size Recommendation App
conference: Built Android app in Java in a team of 3 for visualizing clothing sizes.

title: PINTOS: Operating System Implementation
conference: Implemented kernel threads, user programs, file system, and virtual memory in C on QEMU.
